steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type the database name search pattern in the Schema filter field to locate the target database
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the matching Databases list
Type the A line command in the Select field next to the target database to navigate to the Database Authorizations panel
Press Enter to open the Database Authorizations panel showing all grants for the selected database
